strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective, trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume despite being required stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java production use beyond legacy roles (Dunnhumby, Altom)
German language skill is only 'Basic', potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and Docker, and explicitly mentions contributing to AI-agent infrastructure — directly matching core requirements. However, there is no evidence of Nest.js or Vitest usage, which are explicitly required; while alternatives like Express or plain Node.js are used, this gap is significant. Kotlin/Java experience is outdated and not recent. His open-source work and DevOps skills (GitLab, Docker, CI) are strong compensators, but the absence of required stack components raises risk in onboarding speed.
